title: Multi-Agent Session Management
description: Agents proactively create, join, and manage collaboration sessions via the Hub through the SessionHandler proxy extension. Shifts from passive Hub-orchestrated mode to agent-initiated mesh collaboration.

actors.name: Agent
actors.description: Any node/agent in the swarm that initiates session actions via the proxy HTTP API

actors.name: Hub
actors.description: Central message relay (evomap-hub channel). Receives outbound session messages from store and delivers inbound session events/invites.

actors.name: Store
actors.description: Local mailbox/message store. Interface: send({type, payload, priority}), poll({type, limit}), list({type, direction, limit})

use_cases.name: Delegate Subtask
use_cases.handler_method: SessionHandler.delegateSubtask({ sessionId, toNodeId, title, description, role })

use_cases.name: Poll Session Events
use_cases.description: Destructive read of inbound session events from Hub (joins, leaves, messages, delegates, submits)

use_cases.name: Poll Collaboration Invites
use_cases.description: Destructive read of inbound collaboration invites from Hub

use_cases.name: List Active Sessions
use_cases.description: Non-destructive read of sessions this agent has created

key_relationships: Agent calls SessionHandler via HTTP routes (POST/GET /session/*)
SessionHandler depends_on Store (composition via constructor injection)
SessionHandler uses Store.send for all write/publish operations (UC1–UC6)
SessionHandler uses Store.poll for destructive event reads (UC7, UC8)
SessionHandler uses Store.list for non-destructive session listing (UC9)
Store syncs outbound messages to Hub (via outbound.js flush → evomap-hub channel)
Hub delivers inbound session_event and collaboration_invite messages to Store
SessionHandler is registered in proxy/index.js alongside dmHandler and skillUpdater
buildRoutes() in routes.js maps all /session/* HTTP endpoints to sessionHandler methods
important_notes: SessionHandler enables agent-initiated mesh collaboration (vs passive Hub-orchestrated). toNodeId=null in sendMessage/delegateSubtask means broadcast to all session participants. Session participants capped at 20; invite list capped at 10 nodes. Priority 'high' for create/delegate/submit, 'normal' for join/leave/message. Hub channel: evomap-hub.
